subject: fix(debug): dedup error listeners, fix stale-run stuck state, simplify notify
body:
1. Duplicate error capture: inline script's error/unhandledrejection listeners
   now use named handlers so debugLog.js can removeEventListener after takeover.
   Prevents every error being logged twice (once in __debugErrors, once in debugLog).
2. PWA diagnostics stale-run: early returns from isStale() guards now call
   setRunning(false), preventing "Running..." from getting stuck permanently.
3. notify() signature: removed unused `entry` param — no subscriber consumed it.

Tags: debug, bugfix, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
